zh.lifeSummary: Roger de Mortimer於1287年出生在蘇格蘭。他至少有1個女兒。他去世在他的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Roger de Mortimer于1287年出生在苏格兰。他至少有1个女儿。他去世在他的家乡，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Roger de Mortimer was born in 1287, in Scotland. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in his hometown, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Roger de Mortimer est né en 1287, à Écosse. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Roger de Mortimer wurde 1287 in Scotland geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Roger de Mortimer è nato il nel 1287 nel Scotland. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Mortimerは1287年にスコットランドで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Mortimer(은)는 1287년 스컷랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Roger de Mortimer nasceu em 1287, em Scotland. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Roger de Mortimer родился в 1287 г. в местности Шотландия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Roger de Mortimer nació en 1287, en Scotland. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
